steps.description: Click on the "Actions and apps" button located at the bottom-right corner of the Microsoft Teams chat interface.
Click on the "Search for apps" text box within the context menu under the "tdp_app_KDnWm" section in the Microsoft Teams chat interface to begin typing or selecting an app.
Type text ${{var:app_name}} into the search bar located in the Microsoft Teams desktop interface, specifically within the "Get More Apps" section to find or access a specific app.
Press the "Enter" key to search for "tdp_app_test" in the search input field within the "Get more apps" window of the Microsoft Teams application interface.
Click on the ${{var:app_name}} item in the search results dropdown within the Microsoft Teams application interface.
Type text: 'test' into the input field within the "tdp_app_test" chatbot interface on Microsoft Teams, located in the chat window of the "vscuse_app_yNWA3" conversation.
Click on "Item 1" in the search results list under the "tdp_app_test" dropdown panel within the Microsoft Teams application interface.
Click the "Send" button located at the bottom-right corner of the chat interface in Microsoft Teams, indicated by a red crosshair at coordinates (970, 713).
@assertion 'This is the first item and this is your search query:test' is exist
